login_no_account: Don't have an account? Contact your administrator.
login_terms: By clicking continue, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
workspace_create_description: A workspace groups your projects and team members.
workspace_slug_hint: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.
project_template_kanban_desc: Continuous flow. Columns: To Do, In Progress, Done.
project_template_scrum_desc: Sprint-based. Columns: Backlog, To Do, In Progress, In Review, Done.
project_no_boards_desc: Create a board to start organizing your work in {name}.
board_no_statuses_desc: Create a status to start organizing issues on this board.
settings_language_desc: Choose the language used across the interface.
dashboard_no_workspace_desc: Create a workspace from the sidebar to start organizing your projects and team.
dashboard_no_projects_desc: This workspace has no projects. Create one to get started.
